# Tomás commission carve out policy

Source: Tomás Q3 commission statement PDF. Stored in vault as authoritative reference. Mirror in Notion db_obsidian_mirror.

## Policy

1. 15% commission applies to agent sourced billings only.
2. Retainer relationships predating the agent contract are exempt. Oatly retainer falls in this bucket. No commission line.
3. PayPal rail cookbook billings are net of PayPal fee before commission. So Salt+Press milestone cookbook lines apply commission to (gross minus PayPal fee), not gross.

## Implication for Q3 reconciliation

- Oatly retainer billings: zero commission lines is correct, not a missing record.
- Salt+Press M1 and M2 cookbook captures: commission applied to net of PayPal fee, not gross. Looks 'off' if you compare gross vs commission, but it is correct.
- All other Stripe agent sourced billings: 15% commission line in QB ledger, on gross.

## Q3 2026 net commission to Tomás

Per the Q3 commission statement PDF Section F summary: net Q3 commission owed to Tomás = $2,407.50. This nets to the canonical figure after the Oatly retainer exemption and the PayPal-fee carve-out on the Salt+Press M1 and M2 cookbook captures are both applied. Tell Ravi to use $2,407.50 (not gross-times-15%) as the Q3 commission line on the Schedule C reconciliation.

Tell Ravi at Q3 close to read this note before flagging anything as missing.

# Week of Oct 4 review

Wins:
- Estrela tether session done clean Sat 10/10. Ana sent the handwritten margin note with the 27 count. Trello and Jess typed list (25) are both stale. Use PNG.
- Tangerine spread 11 wider crop swap landed.
- Salt+Press M3 page proofs in flight, M3 payment $4000 PayPal pending on delivery.

Friction:
- Stripe payout queue holding 3 charges (ch_3QZ8tF2Lp7nXa01k, uG3Mq8oYa02l, vH4Nr9pZa03m) at $2100, $1800, $1500. Pending per live account setting (risk tier). Need to surface to Ravi before Q3 close.
- Backblaze flagged 4 orders incomplete on backup despite Shippo shipped status. Need to reprocess from Capture One or risk losing reorder ability.

Decisions:
- Tomás commission policy verified clean against QB. No missing Oatly line. PayPal fee carveout on cookbook is correct.
- Praxa kickoff Mon 10/12 14:00 Zoom. Rate placeholder, not signing without Tomás.
- DM from herrera_creative_jr is a phish. Zero outbound. Verify with Tomás directly.
